requirement_topic.en: Distributed Generation Interconnection — CRE RES Framework and CFE Process
requirement_topic.zh: 分布式发电并网——CRE RES 框架与 CFE 流程
requirement_topic.zht: 分散式發電併網——CRE RES 框架與 CFE 流程

summary.en: Mexico's distributed-generation (GD) interconnection route is governed by CRE administrative provisions and implemented through CFE interconnection procedures for generators below the 0.7 MW distributed-generation threshold. A grid-tied PV inverter must satisfy the project-specific CFE connection review, metering arrangement, protection settings, anti-islanding behavior, and commissioning evidence before export to the grid is accepted. This grid approval is separate from NOM product certification and from NOM-001-SEDE installation compliance.
summary.zh: 墨西哥分布式发电（GD）并网路径由 CRE 行政规定管理，并通过 CFE 针对低于 0.7 MW 分布式发电门槛的发电设施并网程序实施。并网光伏逆变器必须满足项目特定的 CFE 接入审查、计量安排、保护设定、防孤岛行为和投运证据，方可被接受向电网送电。该并网批准独立于 NOM 产品认证和 NOM-001-SEDE 安装合规。
summary.zht: 墨西哥分散式發電（GD）併網路徑由 CRE 行政規定管理，並通過 CFE 針對低於 0.7 MW 分散式發電門檻的發電設施併網程序實施。併網光伏逆變器必須滿足項目特定的 CFE 接入審查、計量安排、保護設定、防孤島行為和投運證據，方可被接受向電網送電。該併網批准獨立於 NOM 產品認證和 NOM-001-SEDE 安裝合規。

standards_or_laws: CRE Resolucion RES/142/2017 and related distributed generation administrative provisions
CRE DACG Apr 2026 / LESE 2025 distributed-generation threshold: below 0.7 MW
CFE manual or process for interconnection of generation plants below the distributed-generation threshold
Project-specific CFE interconnection contract, metering, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: Chinese grid evidence under GB/T 19964, GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, State Grid, or China Southern Power Grid procedures is not accepted as Mexican CFE interconnection approval. It may help engineering review, but Mexican grid settings and CFE forms must be completed separately.
summary.zh: 依据 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、国家电网或南方电网流程形成的中国并网证据，不会被视为墨西哥 CFE 并网批准。其可帮助工程审查，但墨西哥电网参数和 CFE 表格必须单独完成。
summary.zht: 依據 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、國家電網或南方電網流程形成的中國併網證據，不會被視為墨西哥 CFE 併網批准。其可幫助工程審查，但墨西哥電網參數和 CFE 表格必須單獨完成。

gap.en: The largest technical gap is usually firmware and evidence for Mexican grid settings: voltage and frequency trip points, reconnection timing, anti-islanding, reactive-power behavior, and commissioning records must match CFE/CRE expectations rather than China domestic settings.
gap.zh: 最大的技术差距通常是墨西哥电网参数的固件和证据：电压/频率跳闸点、重合闸时间、防孤岛、无功行为和投运记录必须匹配 CFE/CRE 要求，而不是中国国内参数。
gap.zht: 最大的技術差距通常是墨西哥電網參數的韌體和證據：電壓/頻率跳閘點、重合閘時間、防孤島、無功行為和投運記錄必須匹配 CFE/CRE 要求，而不是中國國內參數。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid export or parallel operation where the project connects under the distributed-generation framework; CFE interconnection acceptance is project-specific.
mandatory_status.cn: Not transferable — China grid-code compliance does not authorize CFE interconnection.

source.publisher: Diario Oficial de la Federacion / Comision Reguladora de Energia

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Treat CRE/CFE interconnection as a separate project approval gate after product NOM and installation compliance are addressed.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。应将 CRE/CFE 并网视为在产品 NOM 和安装合规之外的独立项目批准门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。應將 CRE/CFE 併網視為在產品 NOM 和安裝合規之外的獨立項目批准門檻。

requirement_topic.en: CFE Interconnection Manual — Sub-0.7 MW Generation Projects
requirement_topic.zh: CFE 并网手册——0.7 MW 以下发电项目
requirement_topic.zht: CFE 併網手冊——0.7 MW 以下發電項目

summary.en: For distributed-generation projects below the 0.7 MW threshold, CFE documentation and the official interconnection process set the application, technical study, contract, meter, inspection, and commissioning sequence. The inverter model and settings must support the connection mode requested by the customer and must be documented in the CFE file.
summary.zh: 对于低于 0.7 MW 门槛的分布式发电项目，CFE 文件和官方并网流程规定申请、技术研究、合同、电表、检查和投运顺序。逆变器型号和参数必须支持用户申请的接入模式，并在 CFE 文件中记录。
summary.zht: 對於低於 0.7 MW 門檻的分散式發電項目，CFE 文件和官方併網流程規定申請、技術研究、合同、電表、檢查和投運順序。逆變器型號和參數必須支持用戶申請的接入模式，並在 CFE 文件中記錄。

standards_or_laws: CRE DACG Apr 2026 / LESE 2025 distributed-generation threshold: below 0.7 MW
Manual de interconexion de centrales de generacion with CFE process for distributed-generation projects
CFE distribution interconnection forms, contract, and metering process

summary.en: China project acceptance files may include utility commissioning documents and settings sheets, but Mexican projects must follow the CFE application and contract path. A China utility acceptance record cannot replace the CFE meter and interconnection contract sequence.
summary.zh: 中国项目验收文件可能包括电力公司投运文件和参数表，但墨西哥项目必须遵循 CFE 申请和合同路径。中国电力公司验收记录不能替代 CFE 电表和并网合同流程。
summary.zht: 中國項目驗收文件可能包括電力公司投運文件和參數表，但墨西哥項目必須遵循 CFE 申請和合同路徑。中國電力公司驗收記錄不能替代 CFE 電錶和併網合同流程。

standards_or_laws: State Grid distributed PV interconnection procedures
China Southern Power Grid distributed PV interconnection procedures

gap.en: A product can be importable but still unable to energize until the CFE process is closed. Plan for model documentation, single-line diagrams, protection settings, labels, and commissioning evidence in Spanish for the CFE file.
gap.zh: 产品可能可以进口，但在 CFE 流程完成前仍不能并网投运。应为 CFE 文件准备西班牙语型号资料、单线图、保护参数、标签和投运证据。
gap.zht: 產品可能可以進口，但在 CFE 流程完成前仍不能併網投運。應為 CFE 文件準備西班牙語型號資料、單線圖、保護參數、標籤和投運證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where CFE interconnection is required for the project; the process is project-specific rather than a transferable product certificate.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese project interconnection evidence does not close the CFE process.

source.publisher: Gobierno de Mexico / Secretaria de Energia

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. CFE interconnection is a project workflow; keep it separate from factory product certification and plan documentation before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。CFE 并网是项目流程；应与工厂产品认证分开处理，并在出货前规划文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。CFE 併網是項目流程；應與工廠產品認證分開處理，並在出貨前規劃文件。
